title: Senior Teacher - AIF - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - AIF - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
AIF invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AIF:
AIF is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF!
